design_system.name: The Digital Atelier
design_system.concept: High-End Editorial, Luxury, Breathable Layouts, Intentional Asymmetry
rules: No-Line Rule: Prohibit 1px solid borders for sectioning; use background color shifts.
Ghost Border Fallback: If a border is required, use outline-variant at 15-20% opacity.
Strict Square: 0px border radius for all standard elements to convey precision.
Layering Principle: Use surface-container tiers to create depth without relying heavily on shadows.
Floating Principle: Glassmorphism and Backdrop-blur for floating navigation.

usage.display: Noto Serif - High contrast, display-lg to headline-lg, generous tracking.
usage.functional: Manrope - Clean, architectural, body-md for text, label-sm (all-caps) for specs/breadcrumbs.
usage.hierarchy: Prioritize whitespace around typography over size.

buttons.primary: Solid primary background, square corners, generous horizontal padding.
buttons.secondary: Ghost style, transparent background with outline-variant border.

inputs.style: No borders except 1px bottom border. On focus, bottom border transitions to secondary.
inputs.labels: Label sits above the field, Manrope all-caps.

cards.product: No dividers. Generous spacing (spacing.6). Product image is hero, typography floats below. Use surface-container-low.

navigation.style: Floating semi-transparent bar with backdrop-blur. Logo centered.

framework: Tailwind CSS (via CDN) with custom complete theme overriding, Forms and Container Queries plugins.
